name: founder-skills
description: A judgment layer for Claude Code — 15 skills: session calibration, token budget routing, a validate→spec→plan chain, Fable 5 orchestration, craft, and marketplace-maintainer tooling. Works for any builder, developer, or researcher using Claude Code with Fable 5.

plugins.name: session-start
plugins.description: Judgment layer entry point — three AskUserQuestion prompts establish effort tier, domain, and skill routing before any work begins. Start every session here.

plugins.name: effort
plugins.description: Single-question token budget calibrator — sets the model routing tier (Opus 4.8 / Sonnet 4.6, with an external-executor fallback) for the session. Downstream skills inherit this choice.

plugins.name: market-validation
plugins.description: Validate whether there is a real market for a product idea: multi-angle web research with live-URL verification → cited evidence pack → Tufte HTML deck + PDF/PPTX → a build/integrate brief and an emitted market-map graph.

plugins.name: build-options
plugins.description: Decide what to build after a market is validated: divergent options → independent judge-panel weighted decision matrix → adversarial stress-test → a recommended build with kill criteria. Chains into prd → tasks.

plugins.name: prd
plugins.description: Generate a Product Requirements Document for a new feature: self-clarify the open questions, then produce a clear, actionable, implementation-ready PRD. Chains after build-options and into tasks.

plugins.name: tasks
plugins.description: Convert a PRD markdown file into a prd.json task plan: extract tasks and explode each into granular, machine-verifiable sub-tasks with acceptance criteria. Chains after prd.

plugins.name: fable-orchestrated-feature-dev
plugins.description: Fable-plan → implement → review pipeline for new features: Fable writes a detailed plan file, a capable model (Opus 4.8 / Sonnet 4.6) implements it exactly, Fable reviews the output against the spec — with an external-executor fallback when tokens are exhausted. Fable never writes implementation code.

plugins.name: fable-repo-audit
plugins.description: Deep, honest 4-phase repository audit: discovery and mapping → evidence-based findings with severity ratings → improvement strategy → milestone task plan with effort estimates. Grounded in file paths and line numbers; analysis only, no code changes.

plugins.name: fable-org-audit
plugins.description: Live integration audit of a customer organization on your platform: probes real API signals across eight dimensions, grades each 🟢 🟡 🔴 ⚫, and produces a prioritized gap list. Portable pattern with a worked PlatAtlas endpoint mapping; memory accumulates verified org patterns across runs.

plugins.name: fable-loop-design
plugins.description: Design self-correction loops and multi-session memory systems for Fable 5: rubric-driven loops graded by an independent verifier sub-agent (not self-critique), and the fail → investigate → verify → distill → consult memory progression.

plugins.name: tufte-viz
plugins.description: Ideate and critique data visualizations using Edward Tufte's principles — data-ink ratio, chartjunk elimination, graphical integrity, small multiples. Ships four working HTML demos (GISS temperature, Kyoto sakura, sunspot butterfly/pretty) and reference docs on analytical design.

plugins.name: ecosystem-planning
plugins.description: Produce one approvable plan that threads a hard-won lesson through a multi-repo ecosystem (libraries → core service → gateway → consumers): verified-facts discipline, parallel Explore/Plan agents, advisor review, and a re-runnable definition of done. Includes a real robotics worked example.

plugins.name: skill-style-guide
plugins.description: A written house style for skill-marketplace SKILL.md and README.md files: frontmatter rules, trigger-rich descriptions, body skeletons, honesty sections, a six-section README template, and a conformance checklist calibrated against your repo's own golden examples.

plugins.name: skill-release-gate
plugins.description: Local pre-push release gate for a live-publishing skill marketplace: test suites, manifest JSON parse, sanitization grep, gitignore-swallow check, version-bump discipline, installed-cache desync handling, and catalog-site coordination.

plugins.name: skill-freshness-watch
plugins.description: Recurring drift sweep for a published skill marketplace: stale model IDs (with a multi-file bump procedure), stale beta-API claims, dead cited URLs, installed-cache desync, and sibling-repo divergence. Read-only — reports drift, hands fixes to your change process.
